notes: The simulated multi-group survey dataset (withgender) the repo ships inline via DATALINES with list input and a trailing @@; reads 24 record pairs into 48 observations across 6 race groups by gender and year, then the where Race='White' subset (withgender2, 8 obs). Both previewed with PROC PRINT. Only change from source: the LABEL statement's Windows-1252 smart-quote glyphs rendered as plain double quotes; label text unchanged.
